name: CROWN HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I Crown Holdings, Inc. (the "Company" or the "Registrant") (where the context requires, the "Company" shall include reference to the Company and its consolidated subsidiary companies) is a Pennsylvania corporation. The Company was founded in 1892 and is a leading global diversified packaging business that manufactures metal cans and ends (aluminum and steel) for the beverage, food, and aerosol industries and a wide range of transit packaging products and solutions from multiple substrates i...
